issue.title: [server] Verify Discord OAuth state before linking accounts
issue.goal: The Discord callback accepts the authorization code and only uses state to choose the redirect path. The state value is not bound to the initiator and is not validated, so a forged callback can link the wrong Discord account to the victim session. Evidence: server/src/main/java/bhoon/sugang_helper/user/presentation/UserController.java, web/src/app/(user)/onboarding/page.tsx, web/src/app/(user)/settings/page.tsx.
acceptanceCriteria: The issue "[server] Verify Discord OAuth state before linking accounts" is resolved.
